offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: Changes won't load or save until you're back online.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: This module is not yet available.
comingSoon.detail: We're building this feature. It will appear here once it ships.

underDevelopment.title: Under Development
underDevelopment.detail: It will appear here once it ships.

devBypass.bannerDescription: Onboarding setup is incomplete. The dashboard is accessible because the API is running in Development with Features:OnboardingDevBypass enabled. Production builds ignore this flag.

provisioning.title: Setting up your workspace…
provisioning.body: We're creating your database and getting everything ready.
provisioning.note: This takes about 30 seconds. Please don't close this window.

onboarding.stationNotFound: Station not found. Please go back to Step 1.

1.title: Organization & Station
1.description: Create your organization and primary fuel station.

2.title: Fuel Types
2.description: Choose only the fuels this station sells. You can change these later in Settings.

3.title: Opening Prices
3.description: Set the opening price for each fuel type.

4.title: Tanks & Dip Charts
4.description: Add underground tanks and upload dip charts.

6.title: Shift Schedule
6.description: Configure your daily shift schedule. You can change this later in Settings.

7.title: Bank Account
7.description: Add a bank account for payments. (Optional)

9.title: Review & Finish
9.description: Review your setup and go live.

step1.heading: Set up your first station
step1.subheading: We'll create your organization and primary fuel station.
step1.featureOrgDesc: Name and branding for invoices and staff access.
step1.footerNote: You can invite staff and add more stations after completing setup.
step1.formDesc: You can edit these details later from your dashboard.
step1.omcDesc: The OMC your station is registered with.
step1.logoDesc: Paste a public image URL for your logo.

step2.hint: Select at least one. You can add or remove fuels later in Settings.
step2.noOmcProducts: No fuels found for this OMC. Add a custom fuel below.
step2.customNotListed: Add a fuel not in the list
step2.emptySelection: No fuels selected yet — pick at least one to continue.
step2.duplicateName: This fuel is already in your list.
step2.validationError: Select at least one fuel type before continuing.

step3.validationError: Set a price for every fuel type before continuing.

step4.hint: Add at least one tank per fuel type. Each tank needs a dip chart CSV.
step4.noFuelTypes: No fuel types yet. Go back to Step 2 and add fuels first.
step4.emptyTanks: No tanks added yet — add your first tank below.
step4.emptyCoverage: No fuel types have a tank yet.
step4.csvError: Invalid CSV. Use two numeric columns: depth_cm,volume_liters
step4.csvHint: Two columns per row: depth_cm,volume_liters. Header and comment lines are ignored.
step4.validationError: Every fuel type needs at least one tank with a dip chart.
step4.errorCapacityRequired: Enter a valid capacity (must be greater than 0)
step4.errorCsvRequired: Upload a dip chart CSV before adding the tank

step5.hint: Link each nozzle to a tank. Every tank and every fuel type needs at least one nozzle before you continue.
step5.noFuelTypes: No fuel types yet. Go back to Step 2 and add fuels first.
step5.noTanks: No tanks yet. Go back to Step 4 and add tanks first.
step5.noTanksForFuelType: No tanks for this fuel type. Add a tank in Step 4 first.
step5.emptyNozzles: No nozzles added yet — add your first nozzle below.
step5.emptyTankCoverage: No tanks have a nozzle yet.
step5.emptyCoverage: No fuel types have a nozzle yet.
step5.nozzleNameHint: Use a label that matches your pump setup, e.g. D1-N1 (Dispenser 1, Nozzle 1).
step5.validationErrorTanks: Every tank needs at least one nozzle.
step5.validationErrorFuelTypes: Every fuel type needs at least one nozzle.
step5.validationErrorBoth: Every tank and every fuel type needs at least one nozzle.

step6.validationError: Fill in all shift names and start times before continuing.
step6.saveError: Failed to save shift or payment configuration.

step7.hint: You can add more accounts from Settings later.
step7.saveError: Failed to save bank account. Please try again.

step8.hint: Invite a manager to help run your station. You can do this later from Settings.
step8.comingSoon: Manager accounts coming soon — you can invite staff once user management ships.

step9.successToast: Setup complete! Welcome to your dashboard.
step9.failedToast: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.

verifyPhone.title: Verify your phone
verifyPhone.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{phone}}. Enter it below to activate your account.
verifyPhone.codeHelper: 6 digits from the SMS we just sent.
verifyPhone.resentToast: A new code has been sent.
verifyPhone.missingPhoneBody: We couldn't tell which phone to verify. Please start over from the registration page.
verifyPhone.verifiedToast: Phone verified — you can sign in now.

resetPasswordOtp.title: Set a new password
resetPasswordOtp.subtitle: Enter the code we sent to {{phone}} and your new password.
resetPasswordOtp.newPasswordHelper: Min 6 chars, at least one number.
resetPasswordOtp.missingPhoneBody: We couldn't tell which phone to reset. Start over from forgot-password.
resetPasswordOtp.updatedToast: Password updated. You can sign in now.

changePhone.title: Change phone number
changePhone.requestSubtitle: Enter your new phone number. We'll send a 6-digit verification code to the new number. Your current login will keep working until you confirm.
changePhone.confirmSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{phone}}. Enter it below to complete the change.
changePhone.doneSubtitle: Your phone number has been updated to {{phone}}. Future sign-ins should use the new number.
